_comment: This file is OVERWRITTEN each security review. Do NOT append to it.

ssh_attacks.fail2ban_status: active - sshd jail running, 5 currently banned, 3001 total banned
ssh_attacks.change_since_last: Failed attempts at 20544 (up from 19884, +660). fail2ban total bans 3001 (up from 2885, +116). 5 IPs currently banned (down from 9). Continued botnet scanning activity at normal rate. Only authorized logins from novakj via publickey.

pdf_security.innerHTML_note: 27 usages across 9 files: viewer.js, upload.js, merge.js, annotate.js, pages.js, split.js, redact.js, img2pdf.js, text-overlay.js - all static templates, clearing operations, static SVGs, HTML entities, escaped user data (escapeHtml/escapeAttr), or integer-only interpolation. No user data injected unsafely. search.js, convert.js, compress.js, and watermark.js have zero innerHTML.

img2pdf_module_review.innerHTML_note: 3 usages: clearing (line 199), template with escapeHtml/escapeAttr for filenames (line 208), escapeHtml helper return (line 561). Data URLs from FileReader.readAsDataURL interpolated into img src — safe as browser-generated base64.
img2pdf_module_review.image_validation: MIME type via ACCEPTED_TYPES Set + file extension regex. Both checked with OR logic (accepts if either matches).
img2pdf_module_review.user_data_handling: Filenames escaped via escapeHtml() and escapeAttr() before template interpolation. Download filename uses sanitizeFilename() from utils.js. Data URLs from FileReader (browser-safe). Page size/orientation/margin from controlled select elements.

text_overlay_module_review.innerHTML_note: 2 usages: clearing layer (line 353), static × character (line 383). User text rendered via textContent (line 376, 522) — never as HTML.
text_overlay_module_review.user_data_handling: User text stored in overlay.text, rendered via textContent on div elements. Editing uses textarea.value (no HTML parsing). Format controls use parseInt with bounds (8-72), parseFloat, and controlled select elements. Text embedded in PDF via pdf-lib drawText() — rendered as PDF text content, not HTML.
text_overlay_module_review.dom_construction: All overlay elements created via document.createElement() with className/style — no template literal HTML with user data.

redact_module_review.redaction_limitation: Draws opaque rectangles but does NOT remove underlying content streams. Hidden data may still be extractable.

jszip_min_js.purpose: ZIP file creation for split and convert module downloads

known_issues: server_tokens set to 'build' - leaks nginx version (nginx/1.26.3 Ubuntu) in Server header. Should be 'off'.
No general *.md nginx block - only CLAUDE.md specifically blocked. Any new .md file added to webroot would be publicly accessible.
UFW firewall is inactive - only SSH and HTTP/HTTPS ports are needed but no firewall enforces this
disable_symlinks off in nginx config - low risk since only novakj can write to webroot
CGI location block exists in nginx but no CGI scripts present - dead config that could be removed
Codex proxy at /codex returns 502 - backend not running. No security risk but dead endpoint.
TASK-016 redaction tool draws opaque rectangles but does NOT strip underlying content streams - redacted text/images may still be extractable from the PDF file. Users should be warned.

img2pdf.js image validation uses OR logic (MIME type OR extension) - slightly permissive but acceptable for client-side processing since images are rendered via browser Image API which rejects non-images.
notes: Full security review completed - 38 checks passed, 0 critical findings

Reviewed new img2pdf.js module (TASK-018): 3 innerHTML usages, all safe. Filenames escaped via escapeHtml/escapeAttr. Image type validated via MIME+extension. Size limits enforced (50MB/file, 200MB total). sanitizeFilename for downloads. No eval/Function/document.write.

Reviewed new text-overlay.js module (TASK-015): 2 innerHTML usages (clearing + static char). User text rendered exclusively via textContent — never as HTML. All DOM elements created via createElement. Format controls bounded (parseInt 8-72). Text embedded in PDF via drawText(). Fully secure.
All 20 JS files scanned: no eval(), Function(), document.write(), or unsafe patterns found
27 innerHTML usages across 9 files - all verified safe (up from 25/7; img2pdf.js +3, text-overlay.js +2)
SSH: Continued botnet scanning. Failed attempts at 20544 (+660). fail2ban total bans 3001 (+116). 5 IPs currently banned. Only authorized logins from novakj via publickey.
SSL certificate valid until June 18, 2026 (78 days remaining)
recommendations: MEDIUM: Add user-facing warning in redaction UI that underlying PDF data may not be fully removed - only visually covered.
LOW: Set server_tokens off in nginx.conf to stop leaking version info (currently exposes nginx/1.26.3)
LOW: Enable UFW firewall (sudo ufw allow 22,80,443/tcp && sudo ufw enable)
LOW: Add general *.md deny rule to nginx with explicit exception for known safe files
LOW: Remove unused CGI location block from nginx config (no scripts exist)
LOW: Consider disable_symlinks on in nginx for defense in depth
